message:
style: clippy formatting fixes across connectors and crate tests

Apply clippy-suggested formatting improvements across multiple files:

Connectors:
- notion/error.rs: reformat multi-line assert!() calls
- slack/connector.rs: line wrapping for long assert/iterator chains
- slack/error.rs: same assert formatting pattern
- twilio/connector.rs: same pattern
- twilio/error.rs: same pattern

Crates:
- fcp-core/capability.rs: reformat duration_millis::serialize (4 lines)
- fcp-sdk/formatting.rs: fix escape_control_chars test expectations
  to use Rust's actual char escaping: \\x00 -> \\u{0}, \\x1b -> \\u{1b}
- fcp-sdk/ratelimit.rs: minor formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
